programme.title: Super Bowl Classics
programme.sub-title: LII: Philadelphia Eagles vs. New England Patriots
programme.desc: Nick Foles and the underdog Eagles battle with the defending Super Bowl champion Patriots in a memorable matchup as the Eagles triumph and win their first championship in franchise history. From Feb. 4, 2018.

programme.title: NFL Films Presents
programme.desc: Philadelphia Eagles head coach Doug Pederson and quarterback Nick Foles made a bold call on fourth and goal in Super Bowl LII, by going with Philly Special. This is the story behind that bold call!

programme.title: Classic Game Highlights
programme.desc: Check out the 2017 NFC Divisional Round game highlights between the New Orleans Saints and Minnesota Vikings!

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: During the matchup between the New Orleans Saints and the Minnesota Vikings, a last-minute 61-yard touchdown by Stefon Diggs gave Minnesota a 29-24 victory over New Orleans to send the Vikings to the NFC championship game.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Alex Smith completed a 14-yard touchdown pass to Vernon Davis with 9 seconds left just after Drew Brees had put the high-powered Saints ahead during the 2011 NFC Divisional Round.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Relive the 1981 AFC Divisional Round matchup between the San Diego Chargers and the Miami Dolphins, known as The Epic in Miami.

programme.title: The Timeline
programme.desc: Exploring the most memorable cold-weather playoff game in sports history that featured the face-off of two legendary teams: the Dallas Cowboys, led by Tom Landry, and the Green Bay Packers, led by Vince Lombardi.

programme.title: The Timeline
programme.desc: The unseen story of the 1988 Divisional Playoff between the Bears and Eagles in which Soldier Field found itself buried in a fog bank while broadcasters scrambled to show a game that no one could clearly see.

programme.title: NFL Throwback
programme.sub-title: Top Most 10 Devastating Wild Card Losses
programme.desc: From the Music City Miracle to The Comeback, take a look back the 10 most devastating wild card losses in NFL history.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: The Music City Miracle 1999 AFC Wild Card Round matchup between the Bills and the Titans, where a surprising touchdown is still seen as one of the most controversial in NFL history, some claiming the lateral to be an illegal forward pass.

programme.title: Sound FX
programme.desc: Listen to former quarterback and coach Jim Harbaugh mic'd up during his career.

programme.title: NFL Mic'd Up
programme.desc: Listen to coach John Harbaugh mic'd up and making calls.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Relive the final game of Hall of Fame linebacker Ray Lewis' legendary career, as he and quarterback Joe Flacco guided the Baltimore Ravens to a thrilling win over the San Francisco 49ers in Super Bowl XLVII.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: Relive the final game of Hall of Fame linebacker Ray Lewis' legendary career, as he and quarterback Joe Flacco guided the Baltimore Ravens to a thrilling win over the San Francisco 49ers in Super Bowl XLVII.

programme.title: A Football Life
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the iconic play, the "Immaculate Reception," using unique on and off-the-field sights, sounds and stories.

programme.title: A Football Life
programme.desc: An in-depth look at the iconic play, the "Immaculate Reception," using unique on and off-the-field sights, sounds and stories.

programme.title: Classic Game Highlights
programme.desc: The 2012 AFC Divisional Round Game highlights between the Baltimore Ravens and Denver Broncos.

programme.title: Classic Game Highlights
programme.desc: The 2012 AFC Divisional Round Game highlights between the Baltimore Ravens and Denver Broncos.

programme.title: NFL Game Re-Airs
programme.desc: DeSean Jackson scored on a 65-yard punt return on the final play of the game and the Philadelphia Eagles scored 28 points in the final 7:28 to stun the New York Giants 38-31 Sunday and take over first place in the NFC East.

programme.desc: DeSean Jackson scored on a 65-yard punt return on the final play of the game and the Philadelphia Eagles scored 28 points in the final 7:28 to stun the New York Giants 38-31 Sunday and take over first place in the NFC East.

programme.title: unCOMMON: Building A Boston Sports Team
programme.desc: Rory McIlroy, Keegan Bradley and Fenway Sports Group form a roster and begin to carve an identity for Boston Common Golf, one of the six teams that make up the tech-infused golf league known as TGL. The team of four introduces themselves to Boston.

programme.title: unCOMMON: Building A Boston Sports Team
programme.desc: Boston Common Golf scrambles to adjust after the SoFi center roof collapse postpones the league a full year and a team member forfeits their spot on the Ballfrogs in favor of a LIV Golf offer.

programme.title: unCOMMON: Building A Boston Sports Team
programme.desc: An inside look at Keegan Bradley's childhood in Woodstock, Vt.; his career and connection to the city of Boston; with Tyrrell Hatton leaving, they go on the recruiting trail to find a fourth member; David Ortiz talks to the team.

programme.title: unCOMMON: Building A Boston Sports Team
programme.desc: Boston Common Golf closes the deal with their final team member in Japanese superstar Hideki Matsuyama; Rory McIlroy gets his first look at the TGL performance lab.

programme.title: unCOMMON: Building A Boston Sports Team
programme.desc: Rory and Keegan get a first look at the SoFi Center in a pre-season match to get familiar with the new game format, while TGL tests out every element of the competition ahead of the league's debut.
